name: Microservices Architecture
description: Design a microservices architecture for a simple e-commerce platform. The system should handle products, orders, and users with proper service boundaries and communication patterns.
requirements: Choose appropriate communication patterns (sync vs async)
Design data ownership (which service owns which data)
Consider API gateway and service discovery
Include error handling and resilience patterns
context: E-commerce platform needs: product catalog, user management, order processing, payment integration
